navigation.switchTheme: Switch between dark and light themes
session.empty: No chats yet. Select New chat to begin.
workspace.name: Workspace
workspace.pathPlaceholder: Enter an absolute path, for example C:\Users\me\project
workspace.pathAbsoluteRequired: Enter a complete absolute path, for example C:\Users\me\project
onboarding.drop.title: Drop a folder here, or select one
onboarding.drop.description: Choose a folder as the AI workspace. It can access only the files in that folder.
chat.placeholder: Type a message or describe what you want to accomplish…
chat.waitCurrentTurn: Wait for the current turn to finish first
chat.resume.title: Your previous task is unfinished
chat.resume.prompt: Please continue the previous unfinished task.
permission.title: Safety and permissions
permission.revokeAll.confirm: Revoke all grants for this chat? A call already in progress is not affected; future calls will ask again.
permission.executionWarning: High risk: you are granting unattended command execution. Commands outside this scope will still require confirmation. Issue this grant?
mission.complete.title: Task complete
mission.complete.description: All milestones are complete. Automatic progress has stopped.
mission.stuck.title: Task is stuck
mission.stuck.description: There has been no progress for several turns. The task is paused for your direction.
mission.budgetPaused.title: Automatic progress paused
mission.budgetPaused.description: The automatic-progress budget is exhausted. Progress is saved and waiting for your direction.
changes.title: Changes in this turn
changes.empty: No files were changed in this turn
changes.revert.confirm: Revert changes to “{{path}}”? The previous content will be restored and this cannot be undone.
changes.revertTurn.confirm: Revert the entire turn? All revertible files from this turn will be restored and this cannot be undone.
changes.commandNotRevertible: Commands and terminal operations cannot be reverted automatically
error.generic.title: Something went wrong
error.generic.description: The operation could not be completed. Review the details and try again.
error.providerMisconfigured: The model endpoint is not configured or unavailable
error.providerMisconfigured.next: Open Settings → Model providers and check the URL and API key
error.networkDown.next: Try again when online, or use a task that can be completed offline
error.permissionDenied: Permission was denied for this operation
error.permissionDenied.next: Allow it in the prompt, or adjust the mode in Safety and permissions
error.idleTimeout: The turn was stopped after being idle for too long
error.toolLoop: Repeated tool calls were detected, so this turn was stopped
error.cliMissing.title: Claude CLI was not found
error.cliMissing.description: We recommend configuring an API engine. You can get started without installing Claude CLI.
settings.title: Settings
usage.title: Usage and cost
workflow.title: Agent workflows
agent.title: Agents
audit.title: Audit timeline
